chartSnapshot.primary_reason_for_home_health_medical_n: Daisy Mackey, a 78-year-old female, requires home health admission primarily due to her diagnosis of malignant neoplasm of the dome of the bladder (ICD-10 Code C67.1) and her secondary condition of ulcerative chronic rectosigmoiditis with fistula (ICD-10 Code K51.313). Following a recent surgical intervention, which included robotic surgery for the resection and management of her malignant tumor and associated complications, Ms. Mackey is experiencing significant functional limitations, specifically related to woun
